calendar.matters:
Motion To (1) Dismiss Respondent David Zeeman, (2) Deny Petition To Vacate, And (3) Confirm Arbitration Award; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Aug-07-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Atty. JOHN R. YEH, Esq. of Burke, Williams & Sorensen, LLP (Tel: 408-606-6300) for Petitioner San Francisco Unified School District;
Atty. MATTHEW J. MURRAY, Esq. of Altshuler Berzon LLP (Tel: 415-421-7151) for Respondents United Educators of San Francisco and David Zeeman (via Zoom videoconference).

HEARING RE: RESPONDENTS UNITED EDUCATORS OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To (1) Dismiss Respondent David Zeeman, (2) Deny Petition To Vacate, And (3) Confirm Arbitration Award.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Court Reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR No. 10619, Email: raquel@transcriptlegal.com, Tel: 925-226-8222 (302/RBU)

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order granting United Educator of San Francisco's motion to confirm arbitration award. (See signed order for complete ruling.) (302/RBU) *****

MINI MINUTES:

Atty. JOHN R. YEH, Esq. of Burke, Williams & Sorensen, LLP (Tel: 408-606-6300) for Petitioner San Francisco Unified School District;
Atty. MATTHEW J. MURRAY, Esq. of Altshuler Berzon LLP (Tel: 415-421-7151) for Respondents United Educators of San Francisco and David Zeeman (via Zoom videoconference).
